profile.name: Guillermo Palmieri
profile.headline: Full Stack Developer · Backend & AI
profile.bio: I build software focused on Python, backend services and AI integration. I care as much about the logic that holds a service together as about the process of the team that builds it: I've migrated management tooling, brought AI agents into real workflows, and deployed models locally when privacy demands it. I come from data analysis, and it shows in how I approach problems.

experience.description: Development and optimization of Python services for projects based on computer vision and video management. I proposed and led the migration of project management to OpenProject, and the adoption of AI across the team's workflows (custom skills and agents), including the local deployment of models for privacy-sensitive tasks.
Python and JavaScript services with MQTT messaging for IoT devices. Data persistence and querying over SQL, and work on the reliability of the communication between the devices and the backend.
Development and maintenance of Python software to automate and streamline data processing. Application of generative AI (GPT, Gemini) in internal solutions, in collaboration with different teams.
Building KPI indicators for management level, SQL data querying and modeling, and dashboard design in Power BI.
Adapting ERP systems to clients' business needs and managing the Stock, Suppliers and Customers modules, with SQL queries.

education.description: Training in administration and management, with a degree recognizable in Spain.
Complete Python course applied to development and data processing.
Current JavaScript: modern ES, asynchrony and web development.
Data querying and analysis with SQL.

projects.title: Internal documentation system
projects.description: Documentation platform for training materials. A Markdown-to-self-contained-HTML converter in a single Python script with no external dependencies.

projects.title: Self-hosted AI lab
projects.description: Local AI inference environment: deploying LLM models on own hardware with a web interface, for privacy-first tasks.

projects.title: Claude Code course
projects.description: Training material on Claude Code for senior developers: configuration, custom skills, subagents and MCP integration.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: This site. Personal portfolio with a modular JSON-based architecture and several visual themes.
